acceptance_criteria: verification_plan.md preview is complete (not truncated) and references text exports.
formulas.txt and CSVs are attached and readable in artifact previews.
Grader metadata no longer contains conflicting semantic_score fields (or contains explicit justification).
Cell->obligation mapping and expected values are present so a verifier can deterministically check release decision.
Re-run verifier confirms artifacts parseable or text exports provide equivalent deterministic verification.
extra_model_fields.notes: Implementing these changes should convert the current 'accept_with_reservations' outcome to a full deterministic verification pass and eliminate unsupported-claim flags.

planned_changes.description: Produce a full, non-truncated verification_plan.md and attach it to the attempt bundle. Ensure preview_truncated=false for the artifact.
verification_steps: Upload full verification_plan.md to attempt artifacts.
Confirm artifact preview shows full text (preview_truncated=false) in artifact_content_previews.

planned_changes.description: Export workbook contents to text forms for deterministic verification: (a) formulas.txt mapping cell addresses to exact Excel formula strings for all derived/decision cells, (b) CSV exports of Obligations, Release_Decision, and Sensitivity sheets with computed example rows, and (c) optionally include workbook XML fragments (xl/worksheets/*.xml) or the fallback-generation script.
verification_steps: Attach formulas.txt and CSVs to artifacts and reference them in verification_plan.md.
Verify artifact_content_previews show the text files and CSV content.
Document which cell(s) correspond to each packet obligation and decision rule.

planned_changes.description: Clarify/repair grader metadata about semantic evaluation: if semantic correctness was not evaluated, remove or null semantic_score/semantic_correctness_score fields in grader outputs and add a note stating that only artifact-contract precheck was performed; if semantic evaluation was performed, add explicit evidence of checks performed and update metadata to reflect semantic scoring.
verification_steps: Update grader output metadata to be internally consistent.
Include a short note in verification_plan.md enumerating any semantic checks performed (or explicitly state none).

planned_changes.description: Add an explicit mapping checklist in the verification_plan.md linking workbook cell addresses (or formulas.txt entries) to packet obligation IDs and the governing rule they implement. Include the expected numeric outcomes for the supplied packet so automated checks can assert equality.
verification_steps: Add mapping table (cell -> obligation ID -> expected value) to verification_plan.md.
Attach a short script or instructions showing how a verifier can check expected computed values (e.g., a lightweight Python script that reads CSVs and asserts expected values).

planned_changes.description: If feasible, re-run a workbook parse in an environment with openpyxl and attach either (a) an openpyxl dump of formulas/values or (b) a statement that openpyxl parsing was attempted and the parse output file (e.g., formulas_dump.json) is included.
verification_steps: Run openpyxl parsing locally or in CI, generate formulas_dump.json and attach it.
Reference formulas_dump.json from verification_plan.md and update artifact_content_previews accordingly.

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Resolve verifier-identified issues (semantic-score inconsistency, non-parseable XLSX, truncated verification_plan preview) to enable deterministic verification and remove 'accept with reservations'.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Resolve verifier-identified issues (semantic-score inconsistency, non-parseable XLSX, truncated verification_plan preview) to enable deterministic verification and remove 'accept with reservations'.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Deliverables meet the artifact-contract precheck (artifacts present, verification_plan documents formulas, row-level citations, sensitivity and validation checks) and the release decision (FAIL due to O3 failed & critical) is supported. However, the grader/verifier outputs show internal inconsistencies and gaps that reduce confidence: (I001) semantic scoring fields are contradictory (metadata says semantic correctness not evaluated but semantic_score fields are present), (I002) the XLSX binary could not be parsed in the grader environment (openpyxl unavailable), so cell-level verification was based on the verification_plan preview plus trace rather than direct workbook parsing, and (I003) the verification_plan.md preview was truncated in the bundle. Addressing these will make automated verification deterministic and remove the 'accept with reservations' recommendation.
